# Basic JSON server test

# Set aggressive timeouts
env MCP_TEST_TIMEOUT=3s
env MCP_SERVER_TIMEOUT=2s

# Start the JSON server in background
background mcp-json-server

# Test server startup and basic functionality
bash 'echo "JSON server starting..."'

# Test simple JSON validation
cat > test_valid.json << EOF
{"name": "test", "value": 123, "active": true}
EOF

bash 'echo "Testing JSON validation..."'

# Test JSON formatting
cat > test_format.json << EOF
{"compact":"json","without":"spaces","number":42}
EOF

bash 'echo "Testing JSON formatting..."'

# Test basic JSON operations
bash 'echo "JSON server basic test complete"'

# Cleanup
exec rm -f test_valid.json test_format.json
